creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2007-07-28 21:16:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/cheech         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  cheech is a portable, multiplayer, networked Chinese Checkers game.
  It currently lets you play chinese checkers over a network against
  any combination of up to 5 other people or computer players.
  
  WWW: http://cheech.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/114699
  Submitted by:   Yinghong.Liu <relaxbsd@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1124    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/games/cheech/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/cheech/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/games/cheech/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +57 -0     ports/games/cheech/pkg-plist (new)
